description_long: This is a Bosch-branded cordless electric drill, predominantly green and black with red accents. The drill features a pistol-grip handle with a textured black rubberized surface for improved grip and comfort. The front section houses a metallic chuck with a visible twist drill bit attached, and the body includes a prominent trigger button and a forward/reverse switch. The base of the handle contains a detachable battery pack, labeled with voltage and capacity information. Ventilation slots are visible on the upper body, and the drill's surface is mostly matte with some glossy highlights. The overall design is ergonomic, compact, and suitable for handheld use in construction or repair tasks.
description: A green and black Bosch cordless electric drill with a visible drill bit, ergonomic handle, and detachable battery pack. Red accents highlight the trigger and branding, and ventilation slots are present on the body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic chuck with the drill bit, the top of the handle, and the battery pack at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the Bosch logo, trigger button, battery pack details, and ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, battery pack, and the overall width of the drill.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the trigger, forward/reverse switch, and additional branding and labeling.
